<?php /* * This file is part of the Symfony package. * * (c) Fabien Potencier <fabien@symfony.com> * * For the full copyright and license information, please view the LICENSE * file that was distributed with this source code. */ namespace Symfony\Component\VarExporter\Internal; use Symfony\Component\Serializer\Attribute\Ignore; if (\PHP_VERSION_ID >= 80300) { /** * @internal */ trait LazyObjectTrait { #[Ignore] private readonly LazyObjectState $lazyObjectState; } } else { /** * @internal */ trait LazyObjectTrait { #[Ignore] private LazyObjectState $lazyObjectState; } }
